description: Plan one task — produce a tight, reviewable plan in memory/tasks.md before any code
mode: agent
---
Read `AGENTS.md` and `memory/MEMORY.md` first, then follow the instructions in [harness/prompts/plan.md](../../harness/prompts/plan.md).
Also read [harness/prompts/plan-context.md](../../harness/prompts/plan-context.md) if present — this repo's context + watch-for rules for the planner; it takes precedence over the generic guidance where they conflict.

Apply them to the task I describe in chat. Do not write application code yet — write the plan to `memory/tasks.md` and pause for my approval.
